mexico.general: Permits issued by SCT (Secretaría de Comunicaciones y Transportes). Specialized federal plates required.
mexico.weekend_travel: Federally restricted from sunset Friday to sunrise Monday.
mexico.notes: Customs broker strictly required for US-MX border crossings.

uae.general: Permits issued by MoEI (Ministry of Energy and Infrastructure) or local RTA (e.g., Dubai).
uae.weekend_travel: Friday prayer restrictions apply. Typically allowed otherwise outside peak hours.
uae.notes: Police escort heavily regulated and required for loads >4.0 meters wide.

germany.general: VEMAGS system for Großraum- und Schwertransporte. § 29 StVO permits.
germany.weekend_travel: Banned on Autobahns from Friday 15:00 to Monday 09:00.
germany.notes: Police escorts often substituted by private BF4 certified escort vehicles.
